title: Questions on Evas stuff 10 year ago
display_title: Questions on Evas stuff 10 year ago
wikitext:
[]: Questions on Eva's stuff 10 year ago...             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Mar 14, 2010 12:08 pm Well, I'm new to this forum,Hong Kong-er, but be honest, I have been sticked in Eva for 10 years already. Strangely, the first eva I watched is directly EoE but not the TV series. At that time I just barely knew what's happening. Playing Eva's music with piano is I like to do. In the EoE, at last both Shinji and Asuka return to the reality. Should I have a kind of view like this? 1) All the life form didn't return back to their shape, Shinji and Asuka just died from being starved for a week. 2) All the life did come back, just like the case of Misato's in the Second Impact. Human help each other and survive, and live without Angels like TV Ep 26 described. 3) Same as 2, but angels did not stop appearing since Adam is still alive. Human need to face the same fate again and repeat the story again and again. But not Shinji piloting Eva Unit 01 anymore... Wish to know other's thoughts. I suppose communicate with others is the right thing that the human instrumentality project want me to do...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Mar 14, 2010 12:14 pm We truly do not know but you could go to youtube and watch Evangelion Post-Third Impact or whatever it is called. Sort of a look into that universe.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 14, 2010 1:07 pm It's left open what happens after One More Final find your own answer to the question

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Mar 14, 2010 2:11 pm After Complementation ends, we have Yui's words: Episode #26' wrote: Yui: Don't worry. All living things have the ability to return to their original form ... and the heart to go on living. Anywhere can be heaven as long as you have the will to live. After all, you're alive... and you can find the chance to achieve happiness anywhere.

[]: Re: Questions on Eva's stuff 10 year ago...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 14, 2010 2:47 pm edmundasBakashinji wrote: In the EoE, at last both Shinji and Asuka return to the reality. Should I have a kind of view like this?

[]:             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Mon Mar 15, 2010 1:29 am Well that will be a poor storyline if there's no any space for an open ending for me...I know Anno find himself quite tough in planning EoE. And Rebuild as well. Then, I wish to verify something that I interpreted after watching the rebuild... Is Anno want to imply that everyone in the reality did have a personality as same as Ikari Shinji? (especially him, but they may be other characters like Asuka... ) I read some of the past posts here two months ago and got this question. Meaning that we should consider yourself, pretend yourself, or act yourself as Ikari Shinji ? Since I found myself easier to be Ikari Shinji as part of me,say something to myself that "you cannot running away" all the time, feeling uncomfortable when looking at naked Asuka and doing something that you don't want to do but cannot refrain from it Is that running away from myself? If that's true, unite yourself into Eva and take what it says to live in this world. Reasonable or not? Wow....poor expression of English, I watched the Japanese version only btw...
